text: This chapter does not prohibit a consignee not required by Section 61.003 (Duty to Engage Pilot) to engage a pilot from applying for, receiving, and paying for pilot services.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 4
### Chapter 61. Compulsory Pilotage
##### § 61.005 — Pilot Optional

This chapter does not prohibit a consignee not required by Section 61.003 (Duty to Engage Pilot) to engage a pilot from applying for, receiving, and paying for pilot services.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: This chapter does not prohibit a consignee not required by Section 61.003 (Duty to Engage Pilot) to engage a pilot from applying for, receiving, and paying for pilot services.
